summary: Intimate Cal Expo show featuring glowing performances of Gloria, Bird Song and Scarlet‑Fire; recording quality is not specified but listeners seem pleased.
review: Fans recall a tight mid‑week concert at the small Cal Expo venue where the band stretched out on “Gloria,” “Bird Song” and a rippin’ “Scarlet‑Fire,” with the SOTM sequence highlighted as a standout moment. No reviewer commented on the technical side of the tape, but the positive memories suggest it is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers speak fondly of the performance and highlight several songs; however, there are no concrete comments on audio quality, giving moderate confidence in the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention sound clarity, mix balance, or any recording flaws; therefore the technical quality cannot be assessed from the available comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show was noted as an intimate, mid‑week gig with a relaxed crowd, leading to a warm, laid‑back vibe that let the band stretch out on several beloved numbers.
